# Pranav Vadnere - Freelance WordPress Developer & Frontend Engineer

## Overview

Pranav Vadnere is a Freelance WordPress Developer and Frontend Engineer based in Pune, Maharashtra, India.

He specializes in building high-performance, responsive, SEO-friendly, and custom WordPress websites for businesses, startups, agencies, and entrepreneurs.

His expertise includes custom WordPress development, Elementor Pro, WooCommerce, frontend development, performance optimization, technical SEO, accessibility, and website maintenance.

---

## Website

Official Portfolio

- [Pranav Vadnere Portfolio](https://pranavvadnere.netlify.app/)

## Website Navigation

This website is a **single-page portfolio**.

- [Portfolio Projects](https://pranavvadnere.netlify.app/#work)
- [Education & Experience](https://pranavvadnere.netlify.app/#about)

## Services

Pranav provides:

- Custom WordPress Development
- Custom Theme Development
- Elementor Pro Development
- WooCommerce Development
- Responsive Website Development
- HTML5 Development
- CSS3 Development
- Bootstrap Development
- JavaScript Development
- jQuery Development
- PHP Development
- MySQL Integration
- WordPress Speed Optimization
- Core Web Vitals Optimization
- Technical SEO
- Landing Page Development
- Website Redesign
- Website Maintenance
- Bug Fixing
- Website Migration

---

## About

Pranav has more than four years of experience in WordPress Development and Frontend Engineering.

His expertise includes:

- WordPress Theme Development
- Elementor Pro
- WooCommerce
- ACF Pro
- CPT UI
- HTML to WordPress
- PSD/Figma to WordPress
- Responsive Design
- Performance Optimization
- Technical SEO
